v.code: const payload=Array.isArray(label&&label.v)?label.v:[];const valueRecord=payload.find((record)=>record&&record.k==='value');if(!valueRecord||typeof valueRecord.t!=='string') throw new Error('invalid_add_payload');const sizeLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,0,0,'size_now');const nextLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,0,0,'next_index');const size=Number(sizeLbl?sizeLbl.v:0);const next=Number(nextLbl?nextLbl.v:1);V1N.table.addLabel(0,next,0,'value',valueRecord.t||'json',valueRecord.v);V1N.addLabel('size_now','int',size+1);V1N.addLabel('next_index','int',next+1);

const payload=Array.isArray(label&&label.v)?label.v:[];const indexRecord=payload.find((record)=>record&&record.k==='index');const idx=Number(indexRecord&&indexRecord.v);if(!Number.isInteger(idx)||idx<1) throw new Error('invalid_delete_payload');const sizeLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,0,0,'size_now');const size=Number(sizeLbl?sizeLbl.v:0);if(idx>size) throw new Error('delete_index_out_of_range');for(let i=idx+1;i<=size;i++){const movedLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,i,0,'value');const moved=movedLbl?movedLbl.v:null;V1N.table.addLabel(0,i-1,0,'value','json',moved);}V1N.table.removeLabel(0,size,0,'value');V1N.addLabel('size_now','int',size-1);V1N.addLabel('next_index','int',size);

const payload=Array.isArray(label&&label.v)?label.v:[];const indexRecord=payload.find((record)=>record&&record.k==='index');const idx=Number(indexRecord&&indexRecord.v);if(!Number.isInteger(idx)||idx<1) throw new Error('invalid_get_payload');const sizeLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,0,0,'size_now');const size=Number(sizeLbl?sizeLbl.v:0);const found=idx<=size;let value=null;if(found){const valLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,idx,0,'value');value=valLbl?valLbl.v:null;}return[{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'model_type',t:'model.single',v:'Data.Single'},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'found',t:'bool',v:found},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'value',t:'json',v:found?value:null},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'index',t:'int',v:idx}];

const payload=Array.isArray(label&&label.v)?label.v:[];if(payload.some((record)=>record&&record.k!=='model_type')) throw new Error('get_all_payload_must_be_null');const sizeLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,0,0,'size_now');const size=Number(sizeLbl?sizeLbl.v:0);const out=[{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'model_type',t:'model.table',v:'Data.ArrayResult'},{id:0,p:0,r:0,c:0,k:'size',t:'int',v:size}];for(let i=1;i<=size;i++){const valLbl=V1N.readLabel(0,i,0,'value');out.push({id:0,p:i,r:0,c:0,k:'value',t:'json',v:valLbl?valLbl.v:null});}return out;
